baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Is there a skill that can help me review frontend accessibility?
evals.expected_output: A search and quality review of candidate skills, with install guidance only after source, install count, and reputation are checked.
assertions: Searches or checks a skills directory/leaderboard.
Evaluates source reputation and install signals.
Uses pinned Skills CLI commands when showing commands.
Asks or confirms before installing or updating skills.
